message:
🌱 kubevela: [Feature] add dapr addon with pub/sub trait  (#781)

* 🌱 Add argo-workflows: CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, mission

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 kubevela: [Feature] add dapr addon with pub/sub trait

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-5464-cli-support-update-for-cronworkflows-workflowtemplates-and-c",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates",
+    "description": "CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates. Requested by 38+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-workflows deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nhelm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-workflows installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nCurrently Argo CLI doesn't support updating CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates and ClusterWorkflowTemplates. If we want to change any of these resources, we have to delete first and then recreate them."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates,\u2026",
+        "description": "Use the `argo` CLI to update CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates in place without needing to delete and recreate them:\n```bash\n# Update a WorkflowTemplate from a file\nargo template create --strict my-template.yaml\n\n# Update a CronWorkflow from a file\nargo cron create my-cron.yaml\n```\nThis avoids the need to delete and recreate resources, which `kubectl apply` does not validate against the Argo Workflows schema."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"CLI: Support `update` for CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates,\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added CLI support for updating CronWorkflows, WorkflowTemplates, and ClusterWorkflowTemplates in place. This allows users to modify these resources without deleting and recreating them, with proper schema validation that kubectl does not provide.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/5464",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/5465"
+    },
+    "reactions": 38,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {

@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevela-609-feature-add-dapr-addon-with-pub-sub-trait",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevela: [Feature] add dapr addon with pub/sub trait ",
+    "description": "[Feature] add dapr addon with pub/sub trait . Requested by 13+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevela deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubevela version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela\nhelm list -n kubevela 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubevela installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevela configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevela configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevela\n```\nPer offline discussed with  , let's ship dapr trait as a built-in capability. This will make kubevela the best platform to ship dapr apps."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] add dapr addon with pub/sub trait ",
+        "description": "and I have discussed the next steps for shipping Dapr applications with ease on KubeVela. Here is an update of our plan on KubeVela project:\n\n- Currently to ship a Dapr application on k8s involves [multiple manual steps](https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/tree/v1.0.0/hello-kubernetes). For\n```yaml\nkind: Application\n    components:\n    - name: nodejs-app\n      type: webservice\n      properties:\n        image: dapriosamples/hello-k8s-node:latest\n      traits:\n      - type: dapr\n        properties:\n          resourceType: state.redis\n          provider: crossplane\n\n    - name: python-app\n      type: webservice\n      properties:\n        image: dapriosamples/hello-k8s-python:latest\n      traits:\n      - type: dapr\n        properties:\n          resourceType: state.redis\n          provider: crossplane\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela\nkubectl get events -n kubevela --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature] add dapr addon with pub/sub trait \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "and I have discussed the next steps for shipping Dapr applications with ease on KubeVela. Here is an update of our plan on KubeVela project:\n\n- Currently to ship a Dapr application on k8s involves [multiple manual steps](https://github.com/dapr/quickstarts/tree/v1.0.0/hello-kubernetes).",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kind: Application\n    components:\n    - name: nodejs-app\n      type: webservice\n      properties:\n        image: dapriosamples/hello-k8s-node:latest\n      traits:\n      - type: dapr\n        properties:\n          resourceType: state.redis\n          provider: crossplane\n\n    - name: python-app\n      type: webservice\n      properties:\n        image: dapriosamples/hello-k8s-python:latest\n      traits:\n      - type: dapr\n        properties:\n          resourceType: state.redis\n          provider: crossplane"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
